name: Applying Aspect to Career Point — Job Gestation
description: The exact timing sequence of getting a new job is mapped to the applying phase of a transiting planet to a key career point.

source_text.quote: A transiting planet while reaching an exact conjunction / aspect to a sensitive area makes an applying aspect... Gestation time for getting a job involves getting information about availability of job; applying for it; getting an interview; getting selection and joining in a job. All these stages can be traced in phases in the duration of applying aspect.

all_of: A transiting planet is in an applying aspect (approaching exact conjunction or aspect) to a sensitive career point in the natal chart

interpretation.meaning: The exact timing sequence of getting a new job—from the interview to the final joining date—is mapped precisely to the applying phase of a transiting planet to a key career point. The event culminates as the aspect becomes mathematically exact.

metadata.notes: Separating aspects mark the aftermath. The applying aspect acts as the actual trigger timeline.

name: Karma Nakshatra (10th Star) — Job Disruption Trigger
description: Transits of Saturn, Rahu, or Ketu over the 10th nakshatra from Moon trigger immediate job disruptions.

source_text.work_name: Nakshatras as Celestial Blueprints: An Analytical Study of Lunar Mansions in Predicting Major Life Events
source_text.quote: Karma 10th Star... Dictates professional changes, promotions, or job shifts. Transits of Saturn, Rahu, or Ketu over this star trigger immediate job disruptions.

any_of: Transit Saturn passes over the exact longitude of the 10th Nakshatra (Karma Star) counted from the Janma Nakshatra
Transit Rahu passes over the exact longitude of the 10th Nakshatra (Karma Star) counted from the Janma Nakshatra
Transit Ketu passes over the exact longitude of the 10th Nakshatra (Karma Star) counted from the Janma Nakshatra

interpretation.meaning: Provides a longitude-sensitive exact trigger. When natural malefics transit the specific degree of the 10th star from the Moon, it acts as a fast trigger for immediate job disruption, sudden loss, or forced resignation.

metadata.notes: A precision nakshatra transit technique specifically targeting sudden career breaks and endings.

name: Karma Nakshatra (10th Star) — Success Trigger
description: Benefic planets transiting the 10th star from Moon trigger positive career shifts and promotion announcements.

source_text.work_name: Nakshatras as Celestial Blueprints: An Analytical Study of Lunar Mansions in Predicting Major Life Events
source_text.quote: Karma 10th Star... Dictates professional changes, promotions, or job shifts... Benefics transiting here bring success.

all_of: Transit benefic planets pass over the exact longitude of the 10th Nakshatra (Karma Star) counted from the Janma Nakshatra

interpretation.meaning: When benefic planets transit the specific degree of the 10th star from the Moon, it acts as an exact trigger for positive career shifts, promotion announcements, or receiving a definitive job offer.

metadata.notes: Exact degree-based trigger for professional success events.

name: Sanghatika Nakshatra (16th Star) — Business Crisis Trigger
description: Activation of the 16th star from Moon catalyzes sudden business crises and financial disputes.

source_text.work_name: Nakshatras as Celestial Blueprints: An Analytical Study of Lunar Mansions in Predicting Major Life Events
source_text.quote: Sanghatika 16th Star... Triggers financial liabilities, disputes, and structural or business crises.

all_of: Transiting planets pass over the exact longitude of the 16th Nakshatra (Sanghatika) counted from the Janma Nakshatra

interpretation.meaning: Activation of the 16th star from the Moon acts as a catalyst for sudden business crises, financial disputes, and structural challenges in one's profession.

metadata.notes: Specifically impacts independent business owners and structural professional matters on the exact days of the transit.

name: Abhishek Nakshatra (28th Star) — Honors and Promotion Trigger
description: Planets transiting the 28th star relative to the Moon trigger highly visible career milestones and public recognition.

source_text.work_name: Nakshatras as Celestial Blueprints: An Analytical Study of Lunar Mansions in Predicting Major Life Events
source_text.quote: Abhishek 28th Star... Triggers honors, promotions, social recognition, and professional freedom.

all_of: Transiting planets pass over the exact longitude of the 28th Nakshatra (Abhishek) counted from the Janma Nakshatra

interpretation.meaning: An exact longitude-sensitive activation point. When planets transit the 28th star relative to the Moon, it triggers highly visible career milestones, public recognition, honors, and promotions.

metadata.notes: Used to time the exact day or week a promotion or public award is announced (using the 28-star system which includes Abhijit).
